## Summary

## Tests

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm --prefix frontend run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm --prefix frontend run build`
- [ ] `npm --prefix mcp-package run build`
- [ ] contract tests, if contracts changed

## Safety checklist

- [ ] No secrets, PEM files, `.env` files, `.data`, logs, recordings, or local evidence artifacts committed
- [ ] Deployment hashes remain accurate
- [ ] Testnet, wallet, backend-signed demo, and x402 labels remain honest
